name: Patient 5
history: Pattern of starting and abandoning projects. Worked overseas and built website. Family difficulty with father; wrote forgiveness letter.
intermediate_belief: I start things but never finish; I'm all talk.
intermediate_belief_depression: Nothing I do matters; I'm destined to disappoint myself and others.
coping_strategies: Abandoning projects when challenged, rumination about past achievements.
situation: Reflecting on past achievements alongside current challenges.
auto_thought: "That was just luck. I can't replicate it. I'm washed up."
behavior: Abandons current project, scrolls through old work obsessively, avoids starting new tasks.
